result.text:
🧪 Front-Run Alerting Deployed

Both sniffers are now wired for Telegram alerts:
  • 🎯 Equity sniffer (frontrun-sniffer)
  • 🏛 Macro sniffer (macro-frontrun-sniffer)

Alert triggers:
  1. Convergence fingerprint (macro) — when AUCTION + PRIMARYDEALER + FUNDINGPLUMBING all stress simultaneously (Aug 2007 / Sep 2019 / Mar 2020 / Mar 2023 signature)
  2. Regime transitions (NORMAL→ELEVATED→EXTREME or reverse)
  3. EXTREME persisting (every 60 min)
  4. Score jump ≥ 15 points

Cap: 8 alerts/day/sniffer. State stored in S3 alongside the sniffer outputs.

→ https://justhodl.ai/frontrun.html
→ https://justhodl.ai/macro-frontrun.html

macro_log_alert: [macro_frontrun] alert: {'ok': False, 'reason': 'no_threshold_met', 'score': 42, 'regime': 'NORMAL', 'conv_fired': False, 'conv_detail': {'n_pillars_stressed': 0, 'auction_tape_state': 'CALM', 'auction_stressed': False, 'primary_dealer_state': 'NEUTRAL', 'pd_stressed': False, 'funding_state': 'HEALED', 'funding_stressed': False}}
equity_state: NOT_WRITTEN (likely no alert condition met — that's fine)
macro_state: NOT_WRITTEN (likely no alert condition met — that's fine)
